name: UNIVERSITY OF SOUTH DAKOTA STADIUM - FOOTBALL / BASKETBALL

violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving unit in the walk-in cooler was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
